overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a snowy mountain wilderness. The camera follows a character running through deep snow, encountering a herd of deer, and descending to a misty mountain stream with rocky banks and thermal features.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain meadow with scattered pines

events.description: herd of deer begins running across the snow field away from the camera
light snowfall intensifies slightly, reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: running through deep snow across the open mountain meadow toward distant trees

notable_agents.action: herd of deer galloping across the snow field, moving from right to left

entered.detail: steep mountain slope covered in deep snow with rocky outcrops visible
tall evergreen tree with snow-laden branches
tall evergreen tree with snow-laden branches
narrow dark line of water visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain meadow under overcast skies. A herd of deer runs across the center of the frame while the camera moves forward through deep snow. Distant pine trees dot the landscape and a stream is visible far ahead in the valley.

events.description: moving from open meadow into denser tree cover on the approach to the stream
beginning descent down the bank toward the stream edge

agents.ego_description: running downhill between snow-covered pines, approaching the stream bank

entered.detail: snow-covered edge of the mountain stream becoming visible
large boulder partially buried in snow near the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through denser pine trees as it descends toward the stream. The snow remains deep but the terrain slopes downward. Large rocks emerge from the snow near the stream bank, and the water becomes more prominent in the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with flowing water

events.description: reaching the stream edge with visible rocks and flowing water
mist or steam becomes visible rising from the water surface

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating along the stream bank around snow-covered rocks and boulders

entered.detail: dark moving water of the mountain stream with visible current
cluster of boulders protruding from the snow at the water's edge
fog or steam rising from the surface of the stream

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the stream level, revealing flowing water and large rocks at the edge. Mist rises from the water surface, suggesting thermal activity or temperature differences. The scene is more enclosed by trees and rocky terrain as the camera moves along the bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty thermal stream with rocky banks

events.description: mist density increases significantly over the water surface
moving into area with less snow coverage and more exposed rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the misty stream, observing the thermal features and rocky landscape

entered.detail: steep rock face with patches of snow and exposed stone
visible steam or mist concentrated over the water surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the misty stream through a rocky valley. Steam rises prominently from the water, creating an atmospheric effect. The terrain shows more exposed rock and less snow coverage. The camera continues along the bank, surrounded by snow-dusted pines and rocky outcrops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, snowy mountain meadow down into a misty, thermal river valley. It begins by gliding through deep snow under overcast skies as a herd of deer bolts across the wide landscape toward distant pine trees. As the camera descends the slope, the open meadow gives way to denser clusters of pines and emerging boulders, bringing a far-off stream into clear view. The scene then shifts to the water's edge, where the terrain becomes more enclosed by rocky banks and a thick mist begins to rise from the flowing current. Finally, the camera tracks along the bank through a rocky valley, where the snow thins and prominent plumes of steam drift between snow-dusted pines and jagged outcrops.
